Synchronization

Replay Critical Path Profile

For SCN-based synchronization replays, the capture-time commit order is preserved. Based on the commit time, the replay sessions are broken down into multiple sections. The sections that execute the next commit form the "replay c ritical path". Execution of the user calls from the replay critical path determi nes the replay elapsed time.
